title: Custom Advancement Downloader
description:
A mod to download information (json format) about all achievements you are able to see!
Can be used together with a world downloader to get a more accurate world!
body:
### How to Use the Mod:

1. **Join any Minecraft server**.
2. **Run the command:** `/save advancements`
   * This command can be executed at any time after joining.
   
3. **Check the output in chat.**
   * The mod will confirm that the advancements have been saved

---

### Output File:

* The advancement data will be saved as a text file named:
  **`<Server-IP>-ADVANCEMENTS.txt`**
* This file is located in your `.minecraft/config/` 
* The output is in formatted Json.
---

### What It Does:

* The mod scans and saves **all client-side advancement data**.
* Only works on advancements which you are able to see.
* Useful for mod or datapack developers who want to:

  * **Analyze** custom advancement data.
  * **Recreate** advancements.

## Great to use in combination with: 
* [CBD](https://modrinth.com/mod/cbd/)
* [CED](https://modrinth.com/mod/ced/)
* [CBD](https://modrinth.com/mod/cdd/)
